page_content:
REQUIREMENTS

The Leadership Studies Minor consists of 15 credits. At least 9 credits must be at the 300 level or above. Additionally, no more than 6 credits from a student's minor or certiﬁcate program can also be applied to a student's major, and no more than 6 credits may be taken at an institution other than the University of Maryland, College Park. No course with an earned grade below C- may count towards the minor or certiﬁcate.
